fields.title: Gate flake: curated memory HOME race
fields.description: Full npm run gate currently fails in the test phase while the focused failing test passes in isolation. Failure: test/curated-memory-service.test.ts 'fails to read with clear error for non-existent id' sometimes receives MemoryFileError instead of MemoryNoMatch. Likely unrelated HOME process.env race with memory-tool-runtime tests, since both test files mutate process.env.HOME during parallel Vitest execution.
